message.content:
@startuml
actor Player
participant "vc: VirologistController" as vc #D3D8E5#000000 
participant "v:Virologist" as v #D3D8E5#000000  
participant "rrs:RoundRunStrategy" as rrs #D3D8E5#000000   
participant "vv:VirologistView" as vv  #D3D8E5#000000 

Player -> vc :1 collectEventListener(e: Event)
activate vc
    vc->v:2 getRoundRunStrategy()
        activate v
            return rrS:virus.getCollectingStrategy();
        deactivate v
    
    vc-->rrs:4 collect(field: Field)
       activate rrs
           return field.collect(v);
      deactivate rrs
      
   vc -->vv:6 renderActionMenu()
     activate vv
     
         return;
         
     
deactivate vv


return ;



@enduml
